articles.title: Zerodha doubles fee for some intraday F&O trades to Rs 40

The move follows declining volumes and potential STT hikes, prompting other brokers to consider similar pricing adjustments to offset rising costs.

articles.title: Petroleum Ministry issues directions to strengthen natural gas infra, address present complexities and delays
articles.description: The move for a transition to PNG is aimed at easing some of the pressure on LPG

articles.title: BJP chief’s affidavit: Cong, CPI(M) plan legal action
articles.description: Congress and CPI(M) plan legal action against BJP's Rajeev Chandrasekhar for allegedly concealing property in his election affidavit.

articles.title: When an explosion was triggered on the map of India to protest imposition of Hindi
articles.description: Cadres of the Tamil Viduthalai Padai triggered the bomb blast in the Botanical Garden, Udhagamandalam, to press their demand for Tamil Eelam and against the imposition of Hindi

articles.title: 1-month ceasefire, no nukes, reopen Hormuz: Trump's 15-point plan to end Iran war
articles.description: month ceasefire no nukes reopen Hormuz Trumps point plan to end Iran war

articles.title: Iran hits Amazon building in Bahrain, it may make alarms ring in Silicon Valley
articles.description: Iran hits Amazon building in Bahrain it may make alarms ring in Silicon Valley

articles.title: ₹11.21 lakh spent on CM’s interview, says govt; Oppn criticises
articles.description: The Kerala government spent  ₹11.21 lakh on a CM interview with actor Mohanlal, raising concerns over misuse of taxpayer funds for political purposes.

articles.title: No nationwide holiday for Guru Gobind Singh Jayanti as SC flags governance, productivity
articles.description: The court clarified that while the Constitution guarantees freedom of religion, it does not extend to seeking state recognition of a religious occasion as a compulsory nationwide holiday.

topStories.title: BJP chief’s affidavit: Cong, CPI(M) plan legal action
topStories.description: Congress and CPI(M) plan legal action against BJP's Rajeev Chandrasekhar for allegedly concealing property in his election affidavit.

topStories.title: Gujarat Govt passes UCC Bill; live-in registration made mandatory; Congress calls it ‘anti-Muslim’ legislation
topStories.description: The ruling Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) hailed the bill, which exempts tribals, as a landmark reform to ensure equality. The Opposition Congress vehemently opposed it, saying it violates fundamental rights and was ‘anti-Muslim’.

topStories.title: Democrats flip Florida  seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
topStories.description: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

topStories.title: Democrat Emily Gregory wins special election in Donald Trump’s Florida district
topStories.description: A Democrat is set to represent Trump's Mar-a-Lago in Florida's state House after a surprising special election win over Republican Jon Maples. This symbolic victory signals potential challenges for Republicans ahead of the November midterms despite their majority in the statehouse.

topStories.title: SpaceX IPO: Elon Musk-Led Firm May File For US Listing As Soon As This Week, Says Report
topStories.description: It had been expected to raise as much as $50 billion in a record-setting IPO this summer that could value the space exploration company at more than $1.75 trillion.

topStories.title: Philippine president declares energy emergency as impact of Iran war felt - Al Jazeera
topStories.description: Philippine president declares energy emergency as impact of Iran war felt  Al Jazeera

topStories.title: Democrats Flip Florida District Representing Trump's Mar-a-Lago
topStories.description: Republicans hold a wide majority in the Florida statehouse, so the upset will have little effect on state politics.

topStories.title: Puducherry elections 2026: Upset VCK exits DMK-Congress alliance, decides to contest alone
topStories.description: VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan expresses dissatisfaction with the seat-sharing arrangement, declaring the party’s intent to run independently in three constituencies

topStories.title: Is Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman influencing Trump's Iran war strategy, and why would he? | Explained
topStories.description: As tensions escalate in the Middle East following US-Israeli strikes on Iran, Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman appears to be exerting significant influence on US strategy. While publicly advocating for peace, his private discussions with Trump suggest a push for military action against Iran.

topStories.title: What will be the fallout of West Asia war on economy, Opposition asks government
topStories.description: We have the fastest-falling currency, says Congress MP, countering BJP’s ‘fastest-growing economy’ claim

topStories.title: Supreme Court allows pension benefits to SSC women officers as ‘one-time measure’
topStories.description: The court order came as a “one time measure” as pension benefits are only available to uniformed men and women on completion of 20 years of service.

topStories.title: 82nd Airborne Division of D-Day fame to be sent to Middle East amid Iran war—all about Trump's plan to send 1,000 troops
topStories.description: Although US Marines are trained in various mission scenarios, including assisting US embassies and evacuating civilians and providing disaster relief, the 82nd Airborne Division is particularly trained to parachute in behind enemy lines to secure strategic points, key territories, and airfields.

dailyNews.title: Fish on the menu in TMC, BJP campaigns
dailyNews.description: The move comes amid Trinamool Congress chairperson Mamata Banerjee’s relentless campaign to tag BJP as a “party of outsiders” that is against Bengal’s culture.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump claims victory, says Iran gave US a ‘very significant prize’
dailyNews.description: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: The Israeli military said early Wednesday that it was carrying out strikes on targets in Iran’s capital, Tehran, shortly after reporting that Iran had launched a barrage of missiles toward Israel.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan pitches to host US-Iran talks, Trump nods with PM Shehbaz Sharif's post
dailyNews.description: Pakistan pitches to host USIran talks Trump nods with PM Shehbaz Sharifs post

dailyNews.title: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman pushes Trump to continue Iran war: Report
dailyNews.description: In recent conversations, the Saudi leader conveyed that Washington should press ahead toward dismantling Iran’s hard-line government, the report said.

dailyNews.title: US Set to Deploy 2,000 Troops From 82nd Airborne to Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has ordered the 82nd Airborne Division to deploy about 2,000 soldiers to the Middle East, a person familiar with the matter said, as the White House weighs options to ease Iran’s chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Two arrested after US Park Police officer shot in apparent DC ambush: report
dailyNews.description: Two D.C. residents face federal charges after a U.S. Park Police officer was shot in southeast Washington while reportedly sitting in an unmarked Tesla.

dailyNews.title: Judge grants $1 murder bond for Georgia woman accused of using pills to induce second-trimester abortion
dailyNews.description: A Georgia judge granted a $1 murder bond for a woman accused of using pills to end a pregnancy at approximately five months gestation, calling the charge "extremely problematic."

dailyNews.title: Florida GOP gubernatorial candidate calls for sweeping federal limits on Muslim immigration
dailyNews.description: Former Florida House Speaker Paul Renner calls for a permanent federal ban on Muslim immigration, claiming Islam is incompatible with U.S. law.

dailyNews.title: NJ Gov. Sherrill attends mosque led by Imam once accused of Hamas ties in deportation case
dailyNews.description: NJ Gov. Mikie Sherrill attended a Ramadan event at a Paterson mosque led by Imam Mohammad Qatanani, who allegedly has ties to Hamas and fought deportation for years.

dailyNews.title: Rams star Puka Nacua accused of biting woman, making antisemitic remarks: report
dailyNews.description: Los Angeles Rams star Puka Nacua has been accused of biting a woman and making antisemitic comments, allegations his attorney calls a shakedown attempt. A hearing is set for April 14.

dailyNews.title: Ballot box upset: Democrats flip Florida legislative seat in Trump’s stomping ground
dailyNews.description: Trump-endorsed Republican Jon Maples loses to Democrat Emily Gregory in a Florida House District 87 special election in Palm Beach, home to President Donald Trump

dailyNews.title: Pritzker's glowing review of lakefront resurfaces after college student killed by illegal alien nearby
dailyNews.description: Footage from Gov. JB Pritzker's cheerful lakefront video clashed with reality in the wake of Sheridan Gorman's death at the hands of a Venezuelan national.

dailyNews.title: Upcoming book reveals Trump admired Queen Elizabeth for being the 'opposite of me' in one key diplomatic skill
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump recalls being dazzled by Queen Elizabeth II's diplomatic tact in "The Queen and Her Presidents," saying her refusal to criticize anyone was "genius."

dailyNews.title: Dems vow to force weekly Iran war votes after GOP blocks latest move to curb Trump
dailyNews.description: Senate Republicans blocked another war powers resolution, this time from Sen. Chris Murphy, D-Conn., as Democrats vow to force at least one vote per week.

dailyNews.title: EXCLUSIVE: Cameras capture truckers unable to read road signs, answer basic questions during Florida crackdown
dailyNews.description: Troopers say up to half of truckers at some Florida weigh stations fail English proficiency tests as the Trump administration ramps up Department of Transportation enforcement.

dailyNews.title: Oil Prices Tumble 6% as Trump Shows Eagerness to Talk to Iran
dailyNews.description: Investors reacted to signals of possible de-escalation of the war in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Emily Gregory Wins Florida Special Election in Mar-a-Lago’s District
dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory’s victory in Palm Beach brought the Democratic surge to President Trump’s backyard, while a union leader leads in a race for a state senate seat vacated by Florida’s lieutenant governor.

dailyNews.title: N.C. Senator Phil Berger Officially Just Lost to Sam Page
dailyNews.description: Phil Berger had money, power and an endorsement from President Trump. But his critics had a long list of resentments and, on Tuesday, he lost by a mere 23 votes.

dailyNews.title: Trump and Republican National Committee Lean Toward Dallas for Unusual 2026 GOP Midterm Convention
dailyNews.description: Parties normally hold conventions every four years to nominate presidential candidates, but Republicans hope to hold one this year in the face of midterm headwinds.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Step Up Efforts to Reach DHS Funding Deal and End Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A day after President Trump said he did not want a compromise, Senate Republicans sent Democrats a plan that would break off ICE enforcement funding and reopen the rest of the department.

dailyNews.title: Trump Picks ‘Alpha Male’ Influencer to Be Tourism Envoy
dailyNews.description: Nick Adams, known for his crass humor and internet trolling, was previously nominated to be the ambassador to Malaysia. But his nomination was pulled earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Seems Open to Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers at Border
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on with Pentagon expected to send more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said several members of his administration were involved in talks with Iran about the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers and President Trump appear to be edging closer to a framework to wrap up the Department of Homeland Security shutdown — but a breakthrough has remained out of reach. CBS News contacted every House and Senate office to ask what they're doing to end the shutdown.
